description_long: This is a medium-sized blue plastic bucket with a rounded rim and a single, sturdy bail handle attached near the top on opposite sides. The lower portion of the bucket is visibly soiled with brown dirt or mud, suggesting frequent outdoor or utility use. The surface of the bucket shows some scuff marks and wear, indicating it has been handled and used multiple times. The handle is also made of plastic and matches the bucket in color, designed for comfortable carrying. The interior appears empty and clean, with no visible contents or lining. There are no visible labels, markings, or reinforcements on the exterior, and the bucket does not have a lid.
description: A blue plastic bucket with a matching bail handle and visible dirt stains on the lower half, showing signs of outdoor use. The bucket is unmarked and lacks a lid or reinforcements.
description_view_0: The bucket is seen from a slight angle, showing the blue plastic handle and prominent dirt stains on the lower front.
description_view_1: A direct front view with the handle centered and both attachment points visible, highlighting the symmetrical shape and dirt at the base.
description_view_2: The bucket is viewed from the opposite angle of view 0, with the handle angled to the left and dirt stains visible on the lower right.
description_view_3: A rear view with the handle mostly hidden behind the bucket, showing a clean upper rim and dirt concentrated at the bottom.
